frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Cre.Docs: Timestamp for when the event variable was created.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Dat.Docs: The data source of the event variable.  Valid values: `EVENT | EXTERNAL_MODEL_SCORE`  When defining a variable within a detector, you can only use the `EVENT` value for DataSource when the *Inline* property is set to true. If the *Inline* property is set false, you can use either `EVENT` or `MODEL_SCORE` for DataSource.
The data type of the event variable.  Valid values: `STRING | INTEGER | BOOLEAN | FLOAT`

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Def.Docs: The default value of the event variable. This is required if you are providing the details of your variables instead of the ARN.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Des.Docs: The description of the event variable.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Inl.Docs: Indicates whether the resource is defined within this CloudFormation template and impacts the create, update, and delete behavior of the stack. If the value is `true`, CloudFormation will create/update/delete the resource when creating/updating/deleting the stack. If the value is `false`, CloudFormation will validate that the object exists and then use it within the resource without making changes to the object.   For example, when creating `AWS::FraudDetector::Detector` you must define at least two variables. You can set `Inline=true` for these variables and CloudFormation will create/update/delete the variables as part of stack operations. However, if you set `Inline=false`, CloudFormation will associate the variables to your detector but not execute any changes to the variables.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Las.Docs: Timestamp for when the event variable was last updated.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Nam.Docs: The name of the event variable.

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Tag.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

frauddetector.detector.eventvariable.Var.Docs: The type of event variable. For more information, see [Variable types](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/frauddetector/latest/ug/create-a-variable.html#variable-types).
